top_tweets.text:
This is really accurate. 

As much as we all want to drink the vibe coding kool-aid, the reality is that 90%+ of all code in a company is maintaining and migrating existing stuff that is complicated and messy. You can definitely vibe code the remaining 10% but unless there is a
top_tweets.author: chamath
top_tweets.name: Chamath Palihapitiya
top_tweets.summary_zh: 回應「週末就能 vibe coding 做出來」的論調，指出現實中 90% 以上程式碼是在維護和遷移既有的複雜系統，vibe coding 只適合剩下的 10%；原推文也強調品質與深度系統仍需時間累積，無法速成。

context.quoted_text:
Every time I see a tweet saying “I can vibe code this in a weekend” - I think of the slack notification system..

It takes time, persistence and effort to get the details right. 

Sure, a lot of simple workflows will get vibe coded away. And maybe you can put this in Claude Code and get the code right in one shot. 

But quality, depth and great systems will still have value and take time. You can’t vibe code lessons. 

Now and forever.

top_tweets.text:
OpenAI offered $3 billion for Windsurf. Google paid $2.4 billion for the CEO and top researchers. Cognition picked up the remaining company, the IDE, the product, 350 enterprise customers, and $82M ARR, for roughly $250 million.

That $250 million just became the best deal in AI
top_tweets.author: aakashgupta
top_tweets.name: Aakash Gupta
top_tweets.summary_zh: Cognition 以約 2.5 億美元收購 Windsurf 剩餘資產（含產品、350 家企業客戶、8200 萬美元 ARR），相較 OpenAI 出價 30 億、Google 砸 24 億挖角團隊，此交易可能成為 AI 領域最划算的併購案。

context.quoted_text:
Introducing Windsurf 2.0.

Manage all your agents from one place and delegate work to the cloud with Devin - so your agents keep shipping even after you close your laptop. https://t.co/HPdGeosKM0

top_tweets.text:
New course: Spec-Driven Development with Coding Agents, built in partnership with @jetbrains, and taught by @paulweveritt.

Vibe coding is fast, but often produces code that doesn't match what you asked for. This short course teaches you spec-driven development: write a detailed https://t.co/M9zaNg2aTb
top_tweets.author: AndrewYNg
top_tweets.name: Andrew Ng
top_tweets.summary_zh: Andrew Ng 與 JetBrains 推出新課程《Spec-Driven Development with Coding Agents》，教導如何先寫詳細規格再讓 AI 產生程式碼，以改善 vibe coding 常出現「產出不符需求」的問題。

top_tweets.text:
🚨PERPLEXITY JUST LAUNCHED SOMETHING THAT MAKES EVERY OTHER AI PRODUCT LOOK LIKE A TOY.. AND NOBODY IS TALKING ABOUT IT..

They built a Personal Computer.. Not an app.. Not a chatbot.. A full digital worker that runs 24/7 on a Mac mini even while you sleep..

You press both https://t.co/Bxg4D5nQIu
top_tweets.author: EvanLuthra
top_tweets.name: Evan Luthra
top_tweets.summary_zh: Perplexity 推出 Personal Computer 功能，整合至 Mac App，可在本地 Mac mini 上 24/7 運行數位助理，跨檔案、原生 app 與瀏覽器進行自動化操作，現已向所有 Max 訂閱用戶開放。

context.quoted_text:
Today we're releasing Personal Computer.

Personal Computer integrates with the Perplexity Mac App for secure orchestration across your local files, native apps, and browser.

We’re rolling this out to all Perplexity Max subscribers and everyone on the waitlist starting today.

top_tweets.text:
Claude Code just got it's biggest upgrade yet

The desktop app is now by far the best way to be building apps with AI, even better than the CLI

In this video I cover every single change and a few workflows for vibe coding faster than ever, even if you've never coded before: https://t.co/1V1GiKllT8
top_tweets.author: AlexFinn
top_tweets.name: Alex Finn
top_tweets.summary_zh: Claude Code 桌面版大幅升級，被認為是目前用 AI 開發應用程式的最佳方式，甚至超越 CLI；影片中涵蓋所有新功能與加速 vibe coding 的工作流程。

top_tweets.text:
My most powerful vibe coding prompt ever.

Plug this straight into the new Opus 4.7, and you'll literally be able to ship anything.

Fully functional apps, landing pages, custom artifacts - you name it.

Pro tip: plug this into a "vibe coding" expert project as a context file. https://t.co/ISaILZCdZQ
top_tweets.author: milesdeutscher
top_tweets.name: Miles Deutscher
top_tweets.summary_zh: 作者分享一套強大的 vibe coding 提示詞，搭配 Claude Opus 4.7 使用，可快速產出完整功能的應用程式、落地頁與客製化元件；建議將提示詞存為專案情境檔以提升效果。

top_tweets.text:
Turned raw ring photos into a full luxury campaign using AI.

Took basic ring photos → rebuilt → turned into a luxury campaign.

Same product, completely different perception.

That’s what positioning does.

High-quality visuals below ↓ https://t.co/w7vRpKimqt
top_tweets.author: zazzygfx
top_tweets.name: Zazzy
top_tweets.summary_zh: 展示如何用 AI 將基礎戒指照片重建為奢華品牌形象廣告；同樣產品透過視覺定位即可大幅改變市場認知，強調高品質視覺在產品定位中的作用。

top_tweets.text:
We’re hiring a Product Designer at @doist!
Shape productivity tools across every platform.
We’re looking for someone who cares deeply about craft and embraces AI in their work.
Fully async and remote 👋🏼 Let's chat! https://t.co/YsRODtZTuE https://t.co/SiadkGDNnH
top_tweets.author: alexmuench
top_tweets.name: Alex 🌚
top_tweets.summary_zh: Doist 徵求 Product Designer，需具備跨平台設計能力、重視工藝細節並在工作中善用 AI，職位為全遠端非同步協作模式。

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容

top_products.title: Prio

top_products.tagline: Your AI chief of staff for email, calendar, and tasks
top_products.summary_zh: 整合電子郵件、行事曆與待辦事項的 AI 助理，協助使用者管理日常工作流程。

top_products.summary_zh: 讓開發者能用 React 建立同時在終端機與瀏覽器中渲染的應用程式。

top_products.title: Themery

top_products.summary_zh: 協助開發者為整合開發環境（IDE）建立與自訂視覺主題的工具。

top_products.title: Ichiba AI
top_products.author: Michael

top_products.summary_zh: 分析 AI 模型之間的影響力與互動關係，提供量化評分結果。

top_products.summary_zh: 提供表單後端服務，支援 AI Agent 與人類使用者的資料收集需求。
